title: CreateMessageRequest
description: CreateMessageRequest schema from Bandwidth messaging API

from.description: The Bandwidth phone number to send the message from, in E.164 format

to.description: Array of destination phone numbers in E.164 format. Up to 50 numbers for group messaging.

text.description: The text content of the message. Required for SMS. For MMS, text is optional if media is provided.

media.description: Array of media URLs to include as MMS attachments. Each URL must be publicly accessible or a Bandwidth media URL.

applicationId.description: The ID of the Bandwidth application associated with this message. This determines which webhook URLs receive delivery callbacks.

tag.description: A custom string to attach to the message for tracking purposes

priority.description: The priority of the message. High priority messages are delivered faster but may incur additional charges.

expiration.description: The expiration time for the message. Messages not delivered by this time will be discarded.
